subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the tree of mystic knowledge of the All-Merciful Beauty, and fruit of the garden paradise of certitude! That which thou didst write in the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره عرفان جمال رحمن وفاکهه حدیقه جنه ایقان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید در انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause
